benefits.description: Tesamorelin targets visceral fat (fat around organs). Combination with Reta provides overall fat loss with targeted visceral fat reduction.
IGF-1 bump from tesamorelin helps with muscle preservation while in deficit from Reta.
Better insulin sensitivity expected to show in bloodwork (liver enzymes, insulin sensitivity) before visible fat loss.

protocol_notes: User is running Reta + Tesa together currently. Notes that consistency matters more than timing. Mentions clinical studies on Tesa were done on people with metabolic syndrome, not fitness-focused individuals.
